calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust Provisions And Conversion To Unitrust
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thea Beatie Eliot for (petitioner) Barbara Lowe.

The Court asked about the Prudent Investor Rule (PIR) and that it will need a revised order or for counsel to explain why the current order applies. Ms. Eliot referenced the examiner's notes and stated that any trust investment language is exculpatory, that it is strictly construed and that they do not see it as taking things outside of the scope of the PIR. The Court referenced 1604(6)(b) regarding the exception to the rule. Ms. Eliot cited 1604(6)(a) that the PIR applies unless (b) excludes that application but that they do not feel that it is excluded. The Court asked how to avoid an amendment and suggested including language in the order. Ms. Eliot stated that the trust is subject to PIR and that their order reflects that. The Petition for order modifying trust provisions and conversion to unitrust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
